explanation: The user's instruction is to pick up the dirty pot. Since the robot is currently not holding any object and no specific object has been previously discussed (discussed_objects is empty), the robot must first locate the pot. Given that the pot is referred to as 'dirty', it is assumed to be an existing object in the environment. As per the naming convention, the first instance of a new object is named with suffix _0. Thus, the pot is identified as pot_0. The plan begins with finding the pot and then picking it up, as the robot can only hold one object at a time and must first locate it before picking it up.
